creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 213013
py-django-reversion-3.0.7.patch

Hi,

attached is the patch that updates www/py-django-reversion to 3.0.7 and assigns it from Django 1.11 (End-of-Life since April) to Django 2.2 (next LTS releases, supports only Python 3.5 or newer).

Please note that the port itself only support Python 3.6+ as declared in the setup.py.

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.3-RELEASE amd64 for each py36, py37 and py38 flavor) -> OK
- portlint -> OK
